description: This is a light winter wear as well as a style factor in your wardrobe. This sporty jacket does not pinch your pockets and fits in your life easily!Wonder how it feels to wear a jacket? Absolutely great. A jacket adds that classy look effortlessly. Just put it on and feel the transformation take place. It makes a telling fashion statement and yet can also be used as a casual wear. The utility of a Jacket also extends to providing protection from the weather elements. jackets are available in every conceivable design and comes in various colours, sizes and fits. If you don't posses a jacket then its time to get yours now. Give yourself a classic jacket and complete your wardrobe.   Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
